'''鈭歫-n-d-dh''' ('''kajandedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queerbait|queerbait]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queerbait|queerbait]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-n-d-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajandedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijandedhoko|thijandedhoko]] || [[word:jijandedhoko|jijandedhoko]] || [[word:shijandedhoko|shijandedhoko]] || [[word:kijandedhoko|kijandedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujandedhoko|thuthujandedhoko]] || [[word:jujujandedhoko|jujujandedhoko]] || [[word:shushujandedhoko|shushujandedhoko]] || [[word:kukujandedhoko|kukujandedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojandedhoko|thothojandedhoko]] || [[word:jojojandedhoko|jojojandedhoko]] || [[word:shoshojandedhoko|shoshojandedhoko]] || [[word:kokojandedhoko|kokojandedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojandedhoko|thojandedhoko]] || [[word:jojandedhoko|jojandedhoko]] || [[word:shojandedhoko|shojandedhoko]] || [[word:kojandedhoko|kojandedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojandedhoko|thojandedhoko]] || [[word:jojandedhoko|jojandedhoko]] || [[word:shojandedhoko|shojandedhoko]] || [[word:kojandedhoko|kojandedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jandedhoko|th忙jandedhoko]] || [[word:j忙jandedhoko|j忙jandedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙jandedhoko|sh忙jandedhoko]] || [[word:k忙jandedhoko|k忙jandedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajandedhoko|thathajandedhoko]] || [[word:jajajandedhoko|jajajandedhoko]] || [[word:shashajandedhoko|shashajandedhoko]] || [[word:kakajandedhoko|kakajandedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajandedhoko|thajandedhoko]] || [[word:jajandedhoko|jajandedhoko]] || [[word:shajandedhoko|shajandedhoko]] || [[word:kajandedhoko|kajandedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajandedhoko|thajandedhoko]] || [[word:jajandedhoko|jajandedhoko]] || [[word:shajandedhoko|shajandedhoko]] || [[word:kajandedhoko|kajandedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
